prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约82名、107名、79名、91名、100名，近五年位次在79–107之间窄幅波动，2025年基准位次约100名，整体呈小幅后移趋势。\ n该校在福建省物理类招生计划：2021年48人、2022年47人、2023年47人、2024年46人、2025年53人；2026年计划54人，较2025年扩招1人，扩幅约1.9%，对 竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 清华大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年第1名，学校层次为全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强；2 026年声誉评价为偏负面，但事件以中性为主（9条中6条中性），主要涉及校园管理、食堂等非核心议题；抖音热度总排名第2（高热），短视频曝光量极大，反映报考关注度持续 高涨；清华大学拥有38个A-及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术、机械工程、土木工程、建筑学、法学等均为A+，学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生有强大吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等专业2026年均为高热推荐，社会热度持续走高；福建省2026年普通高考总人数约26.79万，较2025年明显增长，物理类考生 估算约20.38万人（较2025年增长约6.1%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；清华大学位于北京，福建省考生对京校偏好较强；清华大学在福建省招生占比约3–5%，属 外省招生中等偏上水平，无特殊地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次窄幅波动、2026年计划微幅扩招1人、福建省物理类考生规模扩大约6.1%、抖音高热关注度等因素 ，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约106名，区间56–156名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 82, 107, 79, 91, and 100 respectively. Over the past five years, rankings have fluctuated narrowly between 79 and 107. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 100, showing a slight backward trend overall.\ nThe university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Fujian Province: 48 in 2021, 47 in 2022, 47 in 2023, 46 in 2024, and 53 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 54, an increase of 1 student compared to 2025, an expansion of about 1.9%, which has a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. It has ranked first in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings for many consecutive years. Its school level is top-tier nationally, exerting a strong attraction for high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but the events are mostly neutral (6 out of 9 are neutral), mainly involving campus management, cafeterias, and other non-core issues. Douyin popularity ranks second overall (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, reflecting sustained high attention for applications. Tsinghua University has 38 A- or above disciplines, among which Computer Science and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Architecture, and Law are all A+, with top-tier disciplinary strength nationally, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended for 2026, with social popularity continuing to rise. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Fujian Province general college entrance examination is approximately 267,900, a significant increase from 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 203,800 (an increase of about 6.1% from 2025), and the expansion of the candidate pool intensifies competition. Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, and Fujian candidates have a strong preference for Beijing universities. Tsinghua's enrollment proportion in Fujian Province is about 3–5%, which is moderately high among out-of-province enrollments, with no special regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan by 1 student, the approximately 6.1% increase in the number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province, and the high Douyin attention, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings shifting slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 106, with a range of 56–156.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 56–106, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than 56, focus on reaching for top-tier Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Clinical Medicine). For rankings in the 106–156 range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 3, supplemented by Tier 2.
